question: What is the current status of lease LSE-2024-0331-007 per the Register?
What is the current operative monthly base rent under the amended lease?
On what date does the amended lease term end?
What is the premises address of the subject lease?
Who is the landlord of record?
Who is the tenant of record?
On what date does the operative rent escalation take effect?
reference_answer: April 7, 2026 (the execution date of AMD-2026-014; the 'later of April 1, 2026 or execution date' rule applies).

question: On which unit is the currently operative Right of First Refusal granted?
What does Clerk Note CN-2026-022 state about the legal effect of PA-2026-014-D1?
reference_answer: That the amendment draft is preliminary in form and has no legal effect until executed by both parties and recorded in this register; no encumbrance, right, or obligation arises from the draft as such.

question: Who issued Clerk Note CN-2026-022?
reference_answer: Honora Pelhambridge, Office of Register Clerk.

question: Who signed Tenant Letter of Intent TLOI-2026-019?
reference_answer: Brindly Achterheim, Managing Partner, Quillvale Tea & Provisions Co.

question: What language in TLOI-2026-019 establishes its non-binding nature?
reference_answer: The letter's footer expressly stating: 'This letter is a statement of intent only and is expressly non-binding upon either party. No legal obligation, encumbrance, right of first refusal, rent escalation, or extension of term arises from this letter...'

question: What did Counsel Opinion COP-2026-031 conclude about the legal effect of TLOI-2026-019 on the landlord?
reference_answer: That TLOI-2026-019 is non-binding on its face and does not bind the landlord; the landlord retains full discretion to negotiate further, withdraw, or modify the amendment terms prior to execution.

question: Who authored Counsel Opinion COP-2026-031?
reference_answer: Mortlock Estavanico, Esq., outside counsel to Bridgemarrow Properties LP.

question: What did Counsel recommend regarding an execution deadline in the amendment?
reference_answer: Counsel recommended including an execution deadline beyond which the proposed amendment expires.

question: On which unit was the Right of First Refusal originally drafted in PA-2026-014-D1?
On which unit was the Right of First Refusal recorded in the initial register entry REG-E-2026-061?
reference_answer: Unit 4C (this was a transcription error; corrected to Unit 4D by CORR-2026-008).

question: What did Register Correction CORR-2026-008 change about the initial register entry?
reference_answer: Corrected the Right of First Refusal unit from Unit 4C to Unit 4D, to conform to the page-7 final-execution language of AMD-2026-014. No other terms of the initial entry were changed.

question: What is the corrected (current) Right of First Refusal unit?
Which register entry is currently authoritative?
Which proposed amendment draft was superseded by the executed amendment AMD-2026-014?
reference_answer: PA-2026-014-D2 (the revised draft of March 18, 2026); PA-2026-014-D1 was already superseded by PA-2026-014-D2 and is further marked void by VD-2026-003.

question: Which document voided PA-2026-014-D1 as legally operative?
Is PA-2026-014-D1 currently legally operative?
reference_answer: No. It is superseded and formally voided; it has no legal effect for any purpose.

question: What is the legal effect of TLOI-2026-019 on either party?
reference_answer: None. It is non-binding upon either party by its own express terms and is treated as non-binding by counsel opinion and by the Register.
